channel.title: linqi — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by linqi (linqi).

item.title: CVE-2026-11347 · 8.5 HIGH — Hardcoded Cryptographic Keys and Weak IV Generation in Linqi Application
item.description: The linqi application contains hardcoded cryptographic keys. Additionally, the application uses a weak algorithm with a limited ASCII charset to dynamically generate Initialization Vectors (IVs) for AES/CBC encryption, making known-plaintext attacks…
